bootstrap.resume.current_focus: No historical execution exists yet. Confirm inputs, initialize the workspace, and prepare to enter stage_2.
bootstrap.resume.current_objective: Bootstrap a new review-master workspace and establish the first actionable state.
bootstrap.resume.next_operator_action: Run gate-and-render, read the bootstrap resume, and start the first authored step from the recommended action.
bootstrap.resume.why_paused: This workspace is new. The resume system is active, but there is no prior history to recover.
gate.allowed.advance_active_comment.inst: Continue updating strategy, target locations, drafts, evidence, supplement intake/landing, completion state, and `workflow_state` for {active_comment_id} in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.advance_active_comment.reas: The current active comment can keep moving forward.
gate.allowed.author_comment_drafts.instr: After the strategy is confirmed, write both `strategy_action_manuscript_drafts` and `comment_response_drafts` for {active_comment_id} in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.author_comment_drafts.reaso: The active strategy is confirmed; the next step is to author Stage 5 drafts.
gate.allowed.author_strategy_card.instru: Fill in `strategy_cards`, `strategy_card_actions`, `strategy_action_target_locations`, `strategy_card_evidence_items`, `strategy_card_pending_confirmations`, and any needed `supplement_suggestion_items` for {active_comment_id} in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.author_strategy_card.reason: Stage 5 already has an active comment, but its strategy-card source-of-truth records are missing.
gate.allowed.enter_stage_2.instruction: Enter Stage 2: fill `manuscript_summary`, `manuscript_sections`, and `manuscript_claims` in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.allowed.enter_stage_2.reason: Stage 1 is ready; the next step is to build structure-summary source-of-truth data.
gate.allowed.enter_stage_3.instruction: Enter Stage 3: write `raw_review_threads`, then canonical atomic comments and their mappings in `review-master.db`, and rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.enter_stage_3.reason: Stage 2 is ready; the next step is to form the two-layer source of truth for raw reviewer threads and canonical atomic items.
gate.allowed.enter_stage_4.instruction: Enter Stage 4: write `atomic_comment_state`, `atomic_comment_target_locations`, and `atomic_comment_analysis_links` in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.enter_stage_4.reason: Stage 3 is ready; the next step is to form the atomic-item workboard.
gate.allowed.enter_stage_5.instruction: Write {ready_comment} into `workflow_state.active_comment_id`, seed any required `supplement_suggestion_items`, prepare the corresponding strategy-card truth in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.enter_stage_5.reason: Stage 4 is confirmed; the next step is to lock the active comment, expose supplement suggestions, and prepare the per-comment strategy card.
gate.allowed.request_pending_confirmatio: Resolve the pending confirmations recorded in `review-master.db` before continuing the current stage.
The state machine requires user confirmation first.
gate.allowed.request_stage3_coverage_con: Show `06-review-comment-coverage.md`, `03-raw-review-thread-list.md`, and `05-thread-to-atomic-mapping.md` to the user, and ask them to confirm whether Stage 3 extracted the review comments completely and mapped them correctly before entering Stage 4.
Stage 3 still requires user confirmation on extraction coverage.
gate.allowed.resolve_comment_blockers.in: Resolve the comment-scoped blockers for {active_comment_id}, finish the evidence or supplement landing for that item, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.resolve_comment_blockers.re: The current active comment still has local blockers; it cannot be marked complete, but switching to another comment is still allowed.
gate.allowed.resolve_global_blockers.ins: Request supplements, clarifications, or additional input based on blockers recorded in `review-master.db`, then write supplement intake/landing truth and close the blockers before continuing.
gate.allowed.set_active_comment.instruct: If you need to change focus, write {other_comment} (or any non-done comment) into `workflow_state.active_comment_id`, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.set_active_comment.reason: Stage 5 allows explicit active-comment switching; the switch must preserve existing strategy, draft, supplement, and blocker records.
gate.allowed.set_next_active_comment.ins: Write {next_comment} into `workflow_state.active_comment_id` and start preparing its strategy card.
gate.allowed.set_next_active_comment.rea: Stage 5 has no active comment; the next step is to lock a ready atomic comment.
gate.allowed.stage4_request_confirmation: Show `07-atomic-comment-workboard.md` and `05-thread-to-atomic-mapping.md` to the user, and ask them to confirm split/merge choices, priorities, and processing order from raw threads to canonical atomic items.
Stage 4 still has pending user confirmations.
gate.allowed.stage6_build_patch_sets.ins: Create `export_patch_sets` and `export_patches` in `review-master.db`, recording explicit source anchors plus `marked_text` and `clean_text` for every modified location, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.stage6_build_patch_sets.rea: Full Stage 6 export must rely on executable export-patch truth rather than manual assembly.
gate.allowed.stage6_build_rows.instructi: Create `response_thread_resolution_links` and `response_thread_rows` in `review-master.db`, assembling thread-level four-column rows from Stage 5 confirmed strategy/drafts and selected manuscript copy, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.stage6_build_rows.reason: Stage 6C is not complete; the final response letter still lacks row-level source of truth.
gate.allowed.stage6_completed.instructio: Stage 6 is complete. Keep exported artifacts unchanged; if new edits are needed, go back to the database source of truth and rerun the gate-and-render script after updating it.
gate.allowed.stage6_completed.reason: All Stage 6 artifacts have been exported.
gate.allowed.stage6_export_clean.instruc: Show the complete marked manuscript and final response-letter preview for final review. If the user approves, call `export_manuscript_variants.py` with the clean patch set, then record final output paths and statuses for the clean manuscript and Markdown/LaTeX response letter.
gate.allowed.stage6_export_clean.reason: Stage 6E is not complete; the clean manuscript and dual-format response letter are not fully exported yet.
gate.allowed.stage6_export_marked.instru: Call `export_manuscript_variants.py` with the marked patch set, export the full marked manuscript, record its path and status in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.stage6_export_marked.reason: Stage 6D is not complete; clean export must wait for full marked-manuscript export and review.
gate.allowed.stage6_generate_variants.in: Generate three manuscript-final-copy variants in `review-master.db` for every action/location pair, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.stage6_generate_variants.re: Stage 6B is not complete; every action-location must have three manuscript-final-copy variants.
gate.allowed.stage6_select_variants.inst: Show `09-action-copy-variants.md` to the user and let them choose one manuscript-final-copy variant for every action/location; write the selections to the database and rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.stage6_select_variants.reas: Stage 6C requires location-level manuscript copy selection before final assembly.
gate.allowed.stage6_style_profile.instru: Complete the global style profile for `manuscript` and `response_letter` in `review-master.db`, including anti-AI rules, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.allowed.stage6_style_profile.reason: Stage 6A is not complete yet; later copy generation lacks a style baseline.
gate.allowed.unknown_state.instruction: The current state does not match the defined state machine. Inspect `workflow_state` in `review-master.db` first.
gate.allowed.unknown_state.reason: The state machine cannot recognize the current stage.
gate.blocked.active_comment_blocker.inst: Do not mark {active_comment_id} as complete yet. Resolve blockers or evidence gaps in the database state and finish supplement intake/landing links first.
gate.blocked.active_comment_blocker.reas: The current active comment still has blockers.
gate.blocked.active_comment_pending.inst: Do not execute revisions for {active_comment_id} yet. Resolve the pending confirmation items for this strategy first.
gate.blocked.active_comment_pending.reas: The active comment still has pending confirmation items.
gate.blocked.missing_workflow.instructio: Stop progression. Repair `workflow_state` in `review-master.db` before rerunning the gate-and-render script.
gate.blocked.missing_workflow.reason: Without a valid database state table, the state machine cannot run.
gate.blocked.stage3_pending.instruction: Do not enter Stage 4 yet. Show `06-review-comment-coverage.md` and get user confirmation that the extracted Stage 3 coverage is complete and correctly mapped first.
gate.blocked.stage3_pending.reason: Stage 3 still has pending coverage-confirmation items.
gate.blocked.stage4_pending.instruction: Do not enter Stage 5 execution yet. Show `07-atomic-comment-workboard.md` to the user and get confirmation on processing order, merge decisions, and lock constraints first.
gate.blocked.stage4_pending.reason: Stage 4 still has pending confirmation items.
gate.blocked.stage6_final_export.instruc: Do not export the clean manuscript or final response letter yet.
gate.blocked.stage6_final_export.reason: The final export gate is not fully satisfied.
gate.blocked.stage6_marked_first.instruc: Do not enter clean-manuscript and final response-letter export yet. Export the marked manuscript first and finish that review round.
gate.blocked.stage6_marked_first.reason: Stage 6 uses a two-step export; the marked manuscript is a prerequisite for clean export.
gate.current_state.missing_workflow_summ: `review-master.db` is missing a valid `workflow_state`; repair the state table first.
gate.repair.action_copy_variants: Fix `action_copy_variants`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.atomic_comment_analysis_link: Fix `atomic_comment_analysis_links`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.atomic_comment_state: Fix `atomic_comment_state`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.atomic_comment_target_locati: Fix `atomic_comment_target_locations`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.atomic_comments: Fix canonical atomic comment records, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.comment_blockers: Fix `comment_blockers`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender strategy-card views.
gate.repair.comment_completion_status: Fix `comment_completion_status`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.comment_response_drafts: Fix `comment_response_drafts`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender strategy-card views.
gate.repair.default: Fix the issue in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script.
gate.repair.export_artifacts: Fix `export_artifacts`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.export_patch_sets: Fix `export_patch_sets`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.export_patches: Fix `export_patches`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.manuscript_summary: Fix `manuscript_summary`, `manuscript_sections`, or `manuscript_claims`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.rationale: Use upstream-first repair order: fix the DB source of truth first, then inspect rerendered views.
gate.repair.raw_review_threads: Fix `raw_review_threads`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.raw_thread_atomic_links: Fix `raw_thread_atomic_links` or `atomic_comment_source_spans`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.response_thread_resolution_l: Fix `response_thread_resolution_links`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.response_thread_rows: Fix `response_thread_rows`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.resume_brief: Fix the resume summary in `resume_brief`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender `01-agent-resume.md`.
gate.repair.resume_must_not_forget: Fix `resume_must_not_forget`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender `01-agent-resume.md`.
gate.repair.resume_open_loops: Fix `resume_open_loops`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender `01-agent-resume.md`.
gate.repair.resume_recent_decisions: Fix `resume_recent_decisions`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender `01-agent-resume.md`.
gate.repair.review_comment_coverage_segm: Fix `review_comment_coverage_segment_comment_links`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender `06-review-comment-coverage.md`.
Fix `review_comment_coverage_segments`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender `06-review-comment-coverage.md`.
gate.repair.review_comment_source_docume: Fix `review_comment_source_documents`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender `06-review-comment-coverage.md`.
gate.repair.selected_action_copy_variant: Fix `selected_action_copy_variants`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.strategy_action_manuscript_d: Fix `strategy_action_manuscript_drafts`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender strategy-card views.
gate.repair.strategy_cards: Fix `strategy_cards`, `strategy_card_actions`, `strategy_action_target_locations`, `strategy_card_evidence_items`, or `strategy_card_pending_confirmations`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.style_profile_rules: Fix `style_profiles` or `style_profile_rules`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.style_profiles: Fix `style_profiles` or `style_profile_rules`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
gate.repair.supplement_intake_items: Fix `supplement_intake_items`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender the supplement-intake plan view.
gate.repair.supplement_landing_links: Fix `supplement_landing_links`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender the supplement-intake plan view.
gate.repair.supplement_suggestion_intake: Fix `supplement_suggestion_intake_links`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender the supplement-suggestion plan view.
gate.repair.supplement_suggestion_items: Fix `supplement_suggestion_items`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender the supplement-suggestion plan view.
gate.repair.workflow_state: Fix `workflow_state`, pending confirmations, or blocker records in `review-master.db`, then rerun the gate-and-render script and rerender views.
view.action_variants.intro: This is the Stage 6 copy-variant view rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `action_copy_variants` and `selected_action_copy_variants`. The three versions here are manuscript-local final copy variants that may actually land in the revised manuscript, not strategy variants and not response-side variants. If one action touches multiple locations, each location must have its own `v1/v2/v3`.
view.action_variants.title: Action Copy Variants
view.agent_resume.intro: This view is rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `resume_brief`, `resume_open_loops`, `resume_recent_decisions`, `resume_must_not_forget`, `workflow_state`, and `runtime_language_context`. It helps the Agent realign state across first entry, cross-session resume, and context compression; it is not a user approval artifact and not a writable source of truth.
view.agent_resume.must_not_forget_intro: These reminders come from the static skill digest and runtime resume layer to keep the Agent aligned over long context spans.
view.agent_resume.open_loops_intro: These are the key items that are still open. During resume, verify them against the current gate output first.
view.agent_resume.recent_decisions_intro: These are recent decisions already locked or confirmed by the user. A new session must not silently overturn them.
view.agent_resume.resume_read_order_intr: Rebuild context in the following fixed order during resume.
view.agent_resume.runtime_digest_intro: The static runtime digest below reminds the Agent of the workflow's core goals, constraints, and execution method.
view.agent_resume.title: Agent Resume
view.atomic_comments.intro: This is the read-only canonical atomic comment view rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `atomic_comments`, `raw_thread_atomic_links`, `raw_review_threads`, and `atomic_comment_state`. One atomic item may serve multiple original reviewer threads.
view.atomic_comments.title: Atomic Review Comment List
view.atomic_workboard.intro: This is the main Stage 4 view. Its sources of truth are `atomic_comment_state`, `atomic_comment_target_locations`, `atomic_comment_analysis_links`, `atomic_comments`, and `raw_thread_atomic_links`. Users read it in Stage 4 to confirm priority, dependency, evidence gaps, and next actions for each canonical atomic item.
view.atomic_workboard.title: Atomic Comment Workboard
view.export_patch_plan.intro: This is the Stage 6 export patch plan rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `export_patch_sets` and `export_patches`. The export script only copies an export tree and applies explicit insert/replace operations anchored here; it does not make semantic judgments and does not generate final wording.
view.export_patch_plan.no_patch_data: No Stage 6 export patch truth available.
view.export_patch_plan.title: Export Patch Plan
view.final_checklist.intro: This is the final closure view rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `comment_completion_status`, `response_thread_resolution_links`, `response_thread_rows`, `export_artifacts`, `raw_review_threads`, and `atomic_comments`. Before export, it must confirm canonical atomic closure, reviewer-thread coverage, and readiness of the marked/clean dual-stage export.
view.final_checklist.title: Final Assembly Checklist
view.manuscript_summary.high_risk_intro: These areas usually require more careful manuscript revision or evidence support.
view.manuscript_summary.intro: This is a full-manuscript read-only view rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `manuscript_summary`, `manuscript_sections`, and `manuscript_claims`. The user should use it to confirm whether the structural understanding is accurate; the Agent may read it for support but must not edit it directly.
view.manuscript_summary.title: Manuscript Structure Summary
view.raw_threads.intro: This is the read-only view of raw review threads rendered from `review-master.db`. Its source of truth is `raw_review_threads`. It is the formal index layer for the final response letter; users should verify reviewer thread order and boundaries here first.
view.raw_threads.title: Raw Review Thread List
view.response_outline.intro: This is the Stage 6 pre-assembly view rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `raw_review_threads`, `response_thread_resolution_links`, `selected_action_copy_variants`, `response_thread_rows`, `atomic_comments`, `strategy_card_actions`, and `strategy_action_target_locations`. The final response letter must follow original `thread_id` order rather than expand canonical atomic items directly. The thread-level row is assembled from Stage 5 confirmed strategy/drafts, Stage 6 selected manuscript final copy, and thread-level aggregation; it does not come from response-side variants.
view.response_outline.title: Response Letter Outline
view.response_table_preview.intro: This is the final Response Letter Markdown preview rendered from `review-master.db`. Its source of truth is `response_thread_rows`. The final output must preserve one point-to-point table row per original reviewer thread.
view.response_table_preview.tex.author: review-master Export
view.response_table_preview.tex.title: Point-to-Point Response Letter
view.response_table_preview.title: Response Letter Table Preview
view.review_comment_coverage.intro: This is the Stage 3 coverage-review view rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `review_comment_source_documents`, `review_comment_coverage_segments`, and `review_comment_coverage_segment_comment_links`. Use it to verify that extracted review comments cover the original source text completely and that covered spans map to the intended `thread_id` and `comment_id` values.
view.review_comment_coverage.legend_cove: `[[covered thread:<thread_id> comments:<comment_id,...>]]...[[/covered]]` marks text already extracted into Stage 3 truth.
view.review_comment_coverage.legend_unco: Any text shown without a `[[covered ...]]` wrapper is still uncovered residual text and must be reviewed before Stage 4.
view.review_comment_coverage.no_document: No review-comment coverage documents are available.
view.review_comment_coverage.summary_tex: {covered_segments} covered segments, {uncovered_segments} uncovered segments, {covered_threads} covered threads
view.review_comment_coverage.title: Review Comment Coverage
view.strategy_card.confirmed_notice: This strategy has been explicitly confirmed by the user. Stage 5 drafts may now be authored or reviewed here.
view.strategy_card.drafts_locked_until_c: Draft authoring is locked until the user explicitly confirms or corrects this strategy card.
view.strategy_card.intro: This card is a read-only strategy view for one canonical atomic item rendered from the database. Its sources of truth include `atomic_comments`, `raw_thread_atomic_links`, `atomic_comment_state`, `atomic_comment_target_locations`, `strategy_cards`, `strategy_card_actions`, `strategy_action_target_locations`, `strategy_card_evidence_items`, `strategy_card_pending_confirmations`, `comment_completion_status`, `strategy_action_manuscript_drafts`, `comment_response_drafts`, and `comment_blockers`. One card serves exactly one `comment_id`.
view.strategy_card.pending_notice: This strategy is still pending explicit user confirmation.
view.strategy_card.response_draft_locked: The response draft is not authored until the user confirms this strategy.
view.strategy_card.title: Response Strategy Card
view.strategy_card.user_may_modify_notic: The user may still revise this strategy card before any Stage 5 draft is treated as valid.
view.style_profile.intro: This is the Stage 6 global style-profile view rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `style_profiles` and `style_profile_rules`. Stage 6 must finish the style profile before generating copy variants and final wording.
view.style_profile.title: Style Profile
view.supplement_plan.intro: This is the Stage 5 supplement-intake and landing-plan view rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `supplement_intake_items` and `supplement_landing_links`. It shows which materials are accepted or rejected and how accepted materials land on canonical atomic actions.
view.supplement_plan.title: Supplement Intake And Landing Plan
view.supplement_suggestion.intro: This is the Stage 5 supplement-suggestion backlog rendered from `review-master.db`. Its sources of truth are `supplement_suggestion_items`, `supplement_suggestion_intake_links`, `atomic_comments`, and `workflow_state`. It shows what materials are still being requested before or alongside supplement intake rounds.
view.supplement_suggestion.title: Supplement Suggestion Plan
view.thread_mapping.intro: This view shows how raw reviewer threads map to canonical atomic comments. Its sources of truth are `raw_thread_atomic_links` and `atomic_comment_source_spans`. Both the user and the Agent should use it to verify whether split/merge/dedup decisions are reasonable.
view.thread_mapping.title: Thread to Atomic Mapping
